Table of Contents

Enum esriNetworkErrors

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Logical network error codes.

[Guid("F227BEC0-CE62-11D1-B274-0000F878229E")]
public enum esriNetworkErrors

Fields

NETWORK_E_ADD_WEIGHT_HAS_ELEMENTS = -2147199684

-2147199684: Cannot add a weight to a network with elements.

NETWORK_E_BAD_TURN_DUPLICATED_FIRST_LAST_EDGES = -2147199688

-2147199688: One of the interior edges of the turn element is the same as the first or last edge.

NETWORK_E_BAD_TURN_INTERIOR_EXTERIOR_CONFLICT = -2147199689

-2147199689: The edges of the turn element conflict with existing interior/exterior edges.

NETWORK_E_BAD_TURN_SELF_LOOP = -2147199687

-2147199687: One of the edges of the turn element is a self-loop.

NETWORK_E_BAD_TURN_UNCONNECTED_ANCHOR = -2147199686

-2147199686: The anchor junction of the turn element is not connected to the last edge.

NETWORK_E_BAD_TURN_UNCONNECTED_EDGES = -2147199685

-2147199685: The edges of the turn element are not connected to each other.

NETWORK_E_BIGINT_INT_CONVERSION = -2147199678

-2147199678: Overflow error attempting to convert value of type BigInteger to Integer.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_CLOSE_TABLE = -2147199732

-2147199732: Cannot close a network table.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_CREATE_TABLE = -2147199739

-2147199739: Unable to create a network table.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_DELETE_TABLE = -2147199731

-2147199731: Cannot delete a network table.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_OPEN_LOGICAL_NETWORK = -2147199679

-2147199679: Cannot open a logical network.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_OPEN_TABLE = -2147199740

-2147199740: Unable to open a network table.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_READ_TABLE = -2147199699

-2147199699: Unable to read from a network table.

NETWORK_E_CANNOT_WRITE_TABLE = -2147199698

-2147199698: Unable to write to a network table.

NETWORK_E_COPY_OVERFLOW_USER_CLASS_ID = -2147199704

-2147199704: Cannot copy and paste a narrow network into a dataset requiring wide networks.

NETWORK_E_CORRUPT_DATA = -2147199697

-2147199697: Corrupted network data.

NETWORK_E_DELETE_WEIGHT_HAS_ASSOCIATIONS = -2147199683

-2147199683: Cannot delete a weight that has weight associations.

NETWORK_E_DUPLICATE_PROPERTY = -2147199682

-2147199682: Network property already exists.

NETWORK_E_DUPLICATE_TURN = -2147199690

-2147199690: Turn element already exists.

NETWORK_E_EDIT_OPERATION_IN_PROGRESS = -2147199701

-2147199701: An edit operation is in progress.

NETWORK_E_EDIT_SESSION_IN_PROGRESS = -2147199719

-2147199719: An edit session is in progress.

NETWORK_E_ELEMENT_TYPE_MISMATCH = -2147199694

-2147199694: Mismatch between element type and weight.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_BITGATE_SIZE = -2147199695

-2147199695: Bitgate weights sizes must be in the range from 1 to 31.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_ELEMENT_CLASSES = -2147199738

-2147199738: Invalid network element classes.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_ELEMENT_ID = -2147199712

-2147199712: Invalid network element id.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_ELEMENT_TYPE = -2147199714

-2147199714: Invalid element type.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_ENGINE = -2147199727

-2147199727: Invalid network engine.

-2147199728: Invalid network engine.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_ENGINE_FSTAR = -2147199726

-2147199726: Invalid engine forward star.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_FEATURE_WORKSPACE = -2147199743

-2147199743: Invalid underlying feature workspace.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_FIELD_NAME = -2147199692

-2147199692: The field name is invalid.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_FORMAT_NUMBER = -2147199734

-2147199734: Invalid format number.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_NETWORK = -2147199724

-2147199724: Invalid network.

-2147199735: Invalid network access.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_NETWORK_NAME = -2147199742

-2147199742: Invalid network name.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_TABLE_NAME = -2147199693

-2147199693: The table name is invalid.

-2147199722: Invalid user class id.

-2147199711: Invalid user id.

-2147199736: Invalid network weight association.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_WEIGHT_TYPE = -2147199713

-2147199713: Invalid weight type.

NETWORK_E_INVALID_WEIGHT_VALUE = -2147199703

-2147199703: Invalid value for given weight type.

NETWORK_E_LOOP_EDGE_CHAIN = -2147199700

-2147199700: There is a loop among the edge elements for this feature.

NETWORK_E_MISSING_PROPERTY = -2147199680

-2147199680: Network property is missing.

NETWORK_E_NETWORK_ALREADY_EXISTS = -2147199723

-2147199723: Network already exists.

-2147199702: No edit operation is in progress.

-2147199717: No edit session in progress.

-2147199691: Old network version.

-2147199733: Old geodatabase version.

NETWORK_E_OVERFLOW_ELEMENT_ID = -2147199706

-2147199706: Invalid element subid.

NETWORK_E_OVERFLOW_USER_CLASS_ID = -2147199709

-2147199709: Id values are too large.

-2147199708: Id values are too large.

NETWORK_E_OVERFLOW_USER_SUB_ID = -2147199707

-2147199707: Id values are too large.

NETWORK_E_PROPERTY_IS_ALREADY_SET = -2147199715

-2147199715: The property has already been set.

NETWORK_E_REACHED_MEMORY_QUOTA = -2147199729

-2147199729: The user-set logical network memory quota has been reached.

NETWORK_E_READ_ONLY_NETWORK = -2147199720

-2147199720: Network is read only.

NETWORK_E_UNDEFINED_PROPERTY = -2147199681

-2147199681: Network property is not defined.

-2147199725: Unknown underlying engine error.
